name: terminal-skills
description: Routes specialized tasks to 1000+ audited agent skills. When your Claude hits a task outside its comfort zone — a deployment platform, a document pipeline, a third-party API — it consults the Terminal Skills agent and executes with proven instructions.

api_token.title: Terminal Skills API key
api_token.description: Needed only for plan_task (skill routing). Search and browsing work without it. Get one free at terminalskills.io/account — every account includes free plan calls each day.
